emailText:
Hi there,

I came across the Westport Heights Hotel website and wanted to share some honest observations. No pitch.

========================================
Website Health Check - Score: 22/100
========================================

Issues found: 24

MEDIUM PRIORITY
--------------------
- Using GoDaddy Website Builder (DIY builder)
  The site runs on GoDaddy Website Builder, a DIY website builder. DIY platforms limit design freedom, performance tuning, and SEO control.

MEDIUM PRIORITY
--------------------
- Using GoDaddy Website Builder (DIY builder)

MEDIUM PRIORITY
--------------------
- Using GoDaddy Website Builder (DIY builder)
  The site runs on GoDaddy Website Builder, a DIY website builder. DIY platforms limit design freedom, performance tuning, and SEO control.

MEDIUM PRIORITY
--------------------
- Using GoDaddy Website Builder (DIY builder)
  The site runs on GoDaddy Website Builder, a DIY website builder. DIY platforms limit design freedom, performance tuning, and SEO control.

LOW PRIORITY
--------------------
- 8 external CSS files
  Each CSS file is a separate HTTP request.

LOW PRIORITY
--------------------
- No schema markup
  Schema helps Google show your hours, reviews, and events in search results.

LOW PRIORITY
--------------------
- Placeholder/low-quality images detected
  Some images appear to be placeholders (very small dimensions).

LOW PRIORITY
--------------------
- No favicon
  Browser tabs show a blank icon instead of your brand.

LOW PRIORITY
--------------------
- SSL certificate expires in 36 days
  SSL cert renews on Jun  6 22:11:36 2026 GMT. Mark your calendar.

LOW PRIORITY
--------------------
- Missing HSTS header
  HTTP Strict Transport Security tells browsers to always use HTTPS. Without it, a downgrade attack is possible.

LOW PRIORITY
--------------------
- Missing Content Security Policy
  CSP helps prevent XSS attacks by controlling which resources can load.

LOW PRIORITY
--------------------
- Missing X-Frame-Options header
  Without this, your site could be embedded in an iframe on another site (clickjacking risk).

LOW PRIORITY
--------------------
- Missing X-Content-Type-Options header
  This prevents MIME-type sniffing attacks.

WHAT IS WORKING WELL
--------------------
+ Page title is set
+ Meta description present
+ Uses H1 heading
+ No mixed content
+ 17 images on the page
+ Light script load (8 scripts)
+ Analytics active
+ Good page size (42.9KB)
+ Clean sans-serif body font
+ Uses modern CSS layout (Flexbox/Grid)
+ Viewport meta tag present (mobile-friendly setup)
+ Uses modern rounded corners / cards
+ Uses shadows for visual depth
+ Contact form/page found on: /contact, /contact-us, /get-in-touch, /contactus, /enquire, /book, /book-now, /reservations, /booking
+ Contact form found on: /contact, /contact-us, /get-in-touch, /contactus, /about, /about-us, /enquire, /enquiries, /book-now, /book, /services, /our-services, /reservations, /booking

========================================

Your current website provider should be flagging things like this for you.
If you ever need a fresh pair of eyes or a new provider, just reach out.

Best,
David
DS Studios
Websites for small businesses in Ireland.

issues.detail: Each CSS file is a separate HTTP request.
issues.label: 8 external CSS files
issues.check: Open DevTools Network tab, reload. Count CSS files.
issues.siteHint: Extra HTTP requests slow down page load.

issues.detail: Schema helps Google show your hours, reviews, and events in search results.
issues.label: No schema markup
issues.check: Search for your business on Google. Does it show a Knowledge Panel with hours and reviews?
issues.siteHint: Detailed search results get higher click-through rates.

issues.detail: Some images appear to be placeholders (very small dimensions).
issues.label: Placeholder/low-quality images detected
issues.check: Do any images look like grey boxes or low-res blurs where real images should be?
issues.siteHint: Replace placeholder images with actual photography or graphics.

issues.detail: Browser tabs show a blank icon instead of your brand.
issues.label: No favicon
issues.check: Look at the browser tab. Is there a small icon next to the page title?
issues.siteHint: A favicon reinforces brand identity and makes tabs recognizable.

issues.detail: SSL cert renews on Jun  6 22:11:36 2026 GMT. Mark your calendar.
issues.label: SSL certificate expires in 36 days
issues.check: Check the lock icon in the address bar.
issues.siteHint: Just a reminder ÔÇö easy to forget until it is too late.

issues.detail: HTTP Strict Transport Security tells browsers to always use HTTPS. Without it, a downgrade attack is possible.
issues.label: Missing HSTS header
issues.check: Open DevTools ÔåÆ Network ÔåÆ click the first request ÔåÆ look for "strict-transport-security".
issues.siteHint: HSTS is a simple config that hardens your site against protocol downgrade attacks.

issues.detail: CSP helps prevent XSS attacks by controlling which resources can load.
issues.label: Missing Content Security Policy
issues.check: Check DevTools Console for CSP-related warnings.
issues.siteHint: A basic CSP blocks most common script injection attacks.

issues.detail: Without this, your site could be embedded in an iframe on another site (clickjacking risk).
issues.label: Missing X-Frame-Options header
issues.check: Check if the site has X-Frame-Options: DENY or SAMEORIGIN in response headers.
issues.siteHint: Without this, others could embed your site on malicious pages.

issues.detail: This prevents MIME-type sniffing attacks.
issues.label: Missing X-Content-Type-Options header
issues.check: Check DevTools Network tab for the header.
issues.siteHint: Minor security hardening.

issues.detail: The site runs on GoDaddy Website Builder, a DIY website builder. DIY platforms limit design freedom, performance tuning, and SEO control.
issues.label: Using GoDaddy Website Builder (DIY builder)
issues.check: View page source and search for the platform name.
issues.siteHint: DIY builders like GoDaddy Website Builder are great for getting started, but as your business grows, the limitations become costly ÔÇö custom features, page speed, and SEO are all capped by the platform.
